Rule.name: Impersonator Plugin Filter Rule
Rule.Description: This is an example rule for selecting who can impersonate whom. Features can be enabled or disabled by changing boolean variables.

Rule.name: Impersonator Plugin Require Password Rule
Rule.Description: This is an example rule for selecting who must supply a password to impersonate another identity.

Argument.name: log
Argument.Description: The log object associated with the SailPointContext.

Argument.name: context
Argument.Description: A sailpoint.api.SailPointContext object that can be used to query the database if necessary.

Argument.name: impersonator
Argument.Description: The name of the current identity, for which we need to evaluate whether or not a password is required.

Rule.name: Impersonator Plugin Require Token Rule
Rule.Description: This is an example rule for selecting who must supply a token to impersonate another identity.

Argument.name: log
Argument.Description: The log object associated with the SailPointContext.

Argument.name: context
Argument.Description: A sailpoint.api.SailPointContext object that can be used to query the database if necessary.

Argument.name: impersonator
Argument.Description: The name of the current identity, for which we need to evaluate whether or not a token is required.
